## Checklist

- [ ] I added or updated tests for my change
- [ ] `pytest packages server` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check` and (for the SDK) `mypy` pass
- [ ] Dashboard changes: `npm run build` passes
- [ ] I kept the Python SDK dependency-free (heavy deps go in `extras` or the server)
- [ ] Docs / README updated if behaviour changed
